name: Aswadh Cat Litter Box Tray Anti Splash Toilet Coffee + Pet Mat Litter Pad & Shovel
description: Description:High quality antibacterial resin material, non-toxic and durable, and environmentally-friendly material PVC, soft, toughness,skidproof and waterproof.Fenced design, cat litter is not easy to splash, easy to clean, and have bright colors.With a shovel, very convenience and won't make your hand dirty when cleaning.Giving your cat a secluded toilet and reduces litter tracking.It can be put under the bowl of your pet to avoid food falling onto the floor, or put beside the toilet place to prevent the sand from being carried to other places.Specification:Litter BoxMaterial: Antibacterial
